title: Senior Software Engineer in Test (SDET)
description:
about company
I am currently working with a well known biotech company. Office located in Woodlands - but there's shuttle bus provided from Woodlands, Admiralty, Sengkang, Punggol, CCK and Boon Lay mrt to office. Office back home, only shuttle bus to woodlands and admiralty.

Salary budget attractive! Hybrid working arrangement - 1 or 2 days WFH. Working hours 8am to 5pm. Can end work at 5pm and have more personal time. You might need to take 7am US calls sometimes (can take from home).

about job (please reach out for detailed JD)

● Spearhead automation testing strategies for complex data-driven software

● Develop sophisticated automated testing frameworks and custom scripts (mainly using Python)

● Provide feedback during peer reviews of architectural designs and source code.

● Uphold rigorous quality standards by ensuring alignment with established SDLC protocols and industry regulations.

● Enhance operational productivity by identifying and deploying upgrades to the testing and development ecosystem.

skills and requirements

● Min 5 years of related experience with a Bachelor's degree, or 3 years with a Master's degree.

● Expertise in Python, Java, C#, or C++.

● Hands-on experience building or scaling automated testing systems and managing CI/CD workflows.

● Competency navigating Linux platforms, cloud infrastructure, and web-based services.

● Familiarity with database interactions and a history of drafting formal technical requirements and test protocols.

● Strong analytical capabilities with the curiosity to master complex domain-specific data analysis.



To apply online please use the 'apply' function, alternatively you may contact Stella at 96554170 (EA: 94C3609 /R1875382)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
